arc: Make an arc diagram of the connections between services in the sample data.
bar: Make a stacked bar chart of quarterly sales by region from the sample data, with one bar per quarter split by region. (Plain bar shows one series; use bar-stacked for multiple regions.)
boxes-and-lines: Draw a boxes-and-lines architecture diagram of the components in the sample data and how they connect.
c4: Create a C4 context diagram of the payments platform in the sample data — show the actors, the system, and their relationships. (Static renders show the context level; containers appear only in the interactive drill-down.)
chord: Make a chord diagram of the service-to-service traffic in the sample data.
class: Create a class diagram of the domain model in the sample data, with each class’s fields and the relationships between classes.
cycle: Make a cycle diagram of the continuous-improvement stages in the sample data.
er: Create an ER diagram of the blog schema in the sample data: tables, columns, and the relationships between them.
flowchart: Make a flowchart of a user login flow: enter credentials, validate them, prompt for a 2FA code, lock the account after 3 failed attempts, otherwise grant access.
function: Plot the functions y = sin(x) and y = x / 2 over the range -6 to 6.
funnel: Make a funnel chart of the signup funnel in the sample data.
gantt: Make a Gantt chart of the project tasks in the sample data, with their start dates and durations.
heatmap: Make a heatmap of the team skills matrix in the sample data.
infra: Create an infrastructure diagram of the services in the sample data, showing request flow and the requests/sec on each connection.
journey-map: Make a customer journey map of the onboarding stages in the sample data, including the action and sentiment at each stage.
kanban: Make a kanban board from the sample data, placing each card in its column.
map: Make a map of the hub flight routes in the sample data, drawing a route from the hub to each destination.
mindmap: Make a mind map of the product ideas in the sample data, branching out from the central topic.
org: Make an org chart of the reporting hierarchy in the sample data.
pert: Make a PERT chart of the project tasks in the sample data, showing dependencies between tasks.
pyramid: Make a pyramid chart of the funnel levels in the sample data, widest at the base.
quadrant: Make a quadrant chart placing each country by GDP and energy use from the sample data.
raci: Make a RACI matrix from the sample data, mapping each role’s responsibility for each task.
ring: Make a ring chart of the department budget breakdown in the sample data.
sankey: Make a Sankey diagram of the service-to-service traffic in the sample data.
scatter: Make a scatter plot of energy use vs GDP per capita from the sample data; group the points by sub-region.
sequence: Draw a sequence diagram of the checkout flow in the sample data — show each message between the participants in order.
sitemap: Create a sitemap of the site structure in the sample data.
slope: Make a slope chart comparing each item’s value between the two periods in the sample data.
state: Make a state diagram of the order lifecycle in the sample data, using the listed states and transitions.
tech-radar: Make a tech radar from the sample data, placing each technology in a ring by adoption level.
timeline: Make a timeline of the product milestones in the sample data.
venn: Make a Venn diagram of the audience sets and their overlaps in the sample data.
wireframe: Sketch a wireframe of a mobile login screen: app logo, email and password fields, a "Sign in" button, and a "Forgot password?" link.
wordcloud: Make a word cloud from the term weights in the sample data.
